title: Bryndas Islands
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bryndas Islands''' was an archipelego on the planet of [[Zelos II]] located in the [[Great Zelosi Sea]].<ref name="Journal">{{JournalCite|13|Day of the Sepulchral Night (short story)}}</ref>
